arts.ttl: PSG predicted XI v Montpellier: key players rested in preparation for Champions League final
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain will make wholesale changes to the side that beat Arsenal on Wednesday. The win over the Gunners secured PSG’s place in the final of the UEFA Champions League…
